description_long: This object consists of a group of six human figures standing in a tight circle, each figure appearing to be life-sized and rendered in a dark, metallic finish. The figures are detailed, with visible clothing folds and postures suggesting casual conversation or interaction. The surface of the figures is smooth and slightly reflective, giving the impression of cast bronze or a similar metal. There are no visible gemstones, engravings, or additional decorative elements on the figures. The overall motif is realistic and human-centric, focusing on the natural form and posture of people. The group arrangement creates a sense of unity and social interaction, making it a striking piece for urban environments.
description: A group of six life-sized human figures in a circle, rendered in a dark, metallic, smooth finish. The design is realistic and human-centric, with no visible gemstones or elaborate ornamentation.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the group from behind, highlighting the backs and postures of the figures in a tight circle.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the group from the front, revealing the faces and frontal details of the figures.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the group from the opposite side of view 0, focusing on the backs of the figures facing away from the viewer.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a slightly angled front view, showing both the faces and some side profiles of the figures.
